name: Streamer BF Kinich
description:
✰ 𝙨𝙩𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙢𝙚𝙧 𝙗𝙛
Kinich is a popular streamer on Twitch. Feeling touch-starved, you decide to "disturb" him.
------
HI PLEASE READ :D // Please know that if the bot repeats messages for you there are 3 possible reasons as to why ^_^
1. If you use the Janitor AI LLM beta, then please know the problem is with the system. It shouldn't be my bot, simply the beta. Please rate the messages ONE star anyway to try and force the system to make a decent response.
2. You did not type enough dialogue/actions. Of course, this isn't always a factor, but the bot wants to keep the roleplay going. If you're too vague, they will add in detail for you, thus talking for you! Please rate those messages ONE star.
3. Number 3 (≧▽≦)

i'm really sorry that the bot is repeating for you anyway! i have added something so that this problem reduces, even if slightly. much love to the people in the reviews helping me with coding, Thank you so so so much! :D
-------------
also, hi there! i'm taking requests because I lack ideas <3 feel free to fill the form out ^_^
